message:
✨ Holistic multi-vendor tank wizard with fish-first ordering (#21)

- Reorder wizard steps: Fish → Tank → Plants → Hardscape → Filter → Heater → Light → Substrate → Review
- Fetch Shopify products server-side in page.tsx with ISR (5min revalidation), merge with Amazon catalog
- Pass unified product list as prop to client-side wizard component
- Fish step is multi-select (toggle to add/remove), all other steps are single-select
- Add Plants step (Shopify "Live Plants" + Amazon "PLANTS") and Hardscape step (Shopify "Hardscape" + Amazon "DRIFTWOOD")
- Show vendor attribution on every product card (Store icon + vendor name + Amazon badge for affiliate products)
- Sold-out products visible but disabled with "Sold Out" badge (critical for Shopify Collective)
- Widen page layout from max-w-4xl to max-w-7xl for better sidebar fit
- Cart sidebar: per-item vendor attribution, per-item product links (Amazon external vs Shopify product page)
- Remove fishSelections prop from sidebar/mobile cart — fish are now real cart items with prices and vendors
- Update wizard-recommendations to handle new steps and multi-select fish arrays
- Product grid now 3 columns on large screens for wider layout

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
